_help.note: JSON does not support comments. Keys starting with '_' are documentation only and are ignored by the app.
_help.docker: Mount this file to /home/appuser/app/settings.json as read-only, then put cookies.jar in the same app directory or mounted volume.
_help.priority: Optional ordered list of game names to prefer. Leave empty to let the miner choose automatically.
_help.exclude: Optional set of game names to skip.
_help.discord_webhook_url: Leave blank to disable Discord notifications. Prefer DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL in .env or compose secrets for real webhook URLs.
_help.logging_level: One of DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR.
_help.proxy: Leave blank unless you need an HTTP or SOCKS proxy URL.
